hero_title_zh: 「策略顧問 共創持續增長」
hero_desc_zh: 金泉集團控股有限公司為香港持牌信託或公司服務提供者（牌照編號：TC010106），提供全方位管理顧問服務，協助企業制定策略、優化營運及建立卓越領導團隊。
hero_desc_en: A licensed Trust and Company Service Provider in Hong Kong (Licence No. TC010106), Gold Spring Group delivers end-to-end management consultancy services designed to help organisations define strategy, optimise operations, and build resilient leadership.
about_intro_zh: 金泉集團控股有限公司為香港持牌信託或公司服務提供者，專注為高淨值人士、家族企業及跨國公司提供信託設立、企業服務及財富管理方案。我們與客戶管理層緊密合作，設計務實方案，確保資產安全、財富傳承及企業合規。
about_intro_en: Gold Spring Group Holdings Limited is a licensed Trust or Company Service Provider in Hong Kong, specialising in trust formation, corporate services, and wealth management solutions for high-net-worth individuals, family enterprises, and multinational corporations. We work closely with clients to design pragmatic solutions ensuring asset security, wealth succession, and corporate compliance.
target_clients_zh: 尋求增長或轉型的中大型企業、準備擴展或傳承的家族企業及私人公司、以及需要區域策略及本地執行支援的跨國企業。
target_clients_en: Mid-to-large corporates seeking growth or transformation, family-owned enterprises preparing for scale or succession, and multinationals requiring regional strategy and local execution support.
leader_bio_zh:
劉應東先生為資深金融服務專業人士，擁有超過15年投資銀行、財富管理及資產管理經驗。畢業於牛津大學數學碩士（一級榮譽），持有特許金融分析師（CFA）、金融風險管理師（FRM）及認證財富管理顧問（CWMA）資格。

創立金泉集團前，劉先生曾於麥格理集團（投資銀行部）、瑞銀（財富管理部）及怡安保險（金融服務及專業團隊）擔任高級職務，主導亞太區併購、首次公開招股及財富管理業務，服務機構及超高淨值客戶。早年曾於太古集團企業融資部及韜睿惠悅退休金部門實習。

劉先生亦積極參與香港公共服務，其公職委任包括：

  • 衛奕信勳爵文物信託基金管理委員會主席（2019–2025）
  • 香港賽馬會音樂及舞蹈信託基金信託人委員會成員（2022–2025）
  • 行政上訴委員會成員（2018至今）
  • 能源諮詢委員會成員（2018至今）
  • 香港會計師公會調查委員會A組成員（2020–2023）
  • 運輸及房屋局運輸審裁處小組成員（2015–2021）
  • 保安局人事登記審裁處裁判官（2013–2019）
  • 民政事務局公共事務論壇成員（2010–2018）
  • 房屋上訴委員會成員（2013–2019）
  • 灣仔區青年活動委員會委員（2013–2019）
  • 東區區議會交通及運輸委員會增選委員（2010–2011）
leader_bio_en:
Ellis Lau is a seasoned financial services professional with over 15 years of experience spanning investment banking, wealth management, and asset management. He read Mathematics at the University of Oxford and graduated with a first-class honours degree in Master of Mathematics (First Class Honours) and obtained Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA), Financial Risk Manager (FRM), and Certified Wealth Management Advisor (CWMA) certifications.

Before founding Gold Spring Group, Ellis held senior positions at Macquarie Group (Investment Banking), UBS (Wealth Management), and Aon (Financial Services & Professional Group), where he led origination and execution of M&As, IPOs, and wealth management mandates for institutional and ultra-high-net-worth clients across Asia-Pacific. He began his career with internships at Swire Pacific (Corporate Finance) and Towers Watson (Retirement Benefits).

Ellis is also a dedicated contributor to public service in Hong Kong. His government and public body appointments include:

  • Chairman, Fund Management Committee — The Lord Wilson Heritage Trust (2019–2025)
  • Board of Trustees Member — Hong Kong Jockey Club Music and Dance Fund (2022–2025)
  • Member, Administrative Appeals Board, HKSAR Government (2018–present)
  • Member, Energy Advisory Committee, HKSAR Government (2018–present)
  • Member, HKICPA Investigation Panel A (2020–2023)
  • Panel Member, Transport Tribunals, Transport and Housing Bureau (2015–2021)
  • Adjudicator, Registration of Persons Tribunal, Security Bureau (2013–2019)
  • Forum Member, Public Affairs Forum, Home Affairs Bureau (2010–2018)
  • Member, Appeal Panel (Housing), Transport and Housing Bureau (2013–2019)
  • Member, District Youth Programme Committee, Wan Chai District (2013–2019)
  • Co-opted Member, Traffic and Transport Committee, Eastern District Council (2010–2011)
careers_text_zh: 金泉集團持續招募認同卓越管理顧問理念的專業人才。如您充滿幹勁、善於分析，並熱衷於為亞太區企業帶來實質影響，歡迎聯繫我們。
careers_text_en: Gold Spring Group is always seeking talented professionals who share our commitment to excellence in management consulting. If you are driven, analytical, and passionate about making a real impact for organisations across Asia-Pacific, we would love to hear from you.
contact_address:
40/F, United Asia Finance Centre,
333 Lockhart Road, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
香港灣仔駱克道333號亞洲聯合財務中心40樓
office_intro_zh: 金泉集團位於灣仔駱克道333號亞洲聯合財務中心40樓，地處香港核心商業區。
office_intro_en: Gold Spring Group is located on the 40th floor of United Asia Finance Centre, 333 Lockhart Road, Wan Chai — at the heart of Hong Kong's commercial district.
service1_desc_zh: 為客戶設計及設立度身訂造的信託架構，包括全權信託、固定信託及慈善信託，並提供持續的信託管理服務。
service1_desc_en: Design and establish bespoke trust structures for clients, including discretionary trusts, fixed trusts, and charitable trusts, with ongoing trust administration services.
service2_desc_zh: 提供香港公司註冊、公司秘書、註冊辦事處、董事及股東代名人服務，支援客戶的企業架構需求。
service2_desc_en: Provide Hong Kong company incorporation, company secretarial, registered office, and nominee director and shareholder services to support clients' corporate structuring needs.
service3_desc_zh: 協助高淨值家族制定全面的財富傳承策略，確保資產按家族意願跨代傳承，避免遺產糾紛。
service3_desc_en: Assist high-net-worth families in developing comprehensive wealth succession strategies, ensuring assets pass across generations according to family wishes and avoiding estate disputes.
service4_desc_zh: 透過信託及企業架構為客戶建立有效的資產保護屏障，隔離個人與商業風險。
service4_desc_en: Build effective asset protection barriers through trust and corporate structures, isolating personal and business risks for clients.
service5_desc_zh: 根據《打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集條例》要求，提供客戶盡職調查（CDD）、反洗錢（AML）合規及持續監察服務。
service5_desc_en: Provide Customer Due Diligence (CDD), Anti-Money Laundering (AML) compliance, and ongoing monitoring services in accordance with the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance.
service6_desc_zh: 為信託及企業客戶提供稅務規劃、會計記錄、審計安排及利得稅申報服務。
service6_desc_en: Provide tax planning, accounting records, audit arrangements, and profits tax filing services for trust and corporate clients.
compliance_desc_zh: 作為香港持牌信託或公司服務提供者（牌照編號：TC010106），金泉集團嚴格遵守《打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集條例》（AMLO）的所有要求，確保業務運營符合最高監管標準。
compliance_desc_en: As a licensed Trust or Company Service Provider in Hong Kong (Licence No. TC010106), Gold Spring Group strictly adheres to all requirements under the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance (AMLO), ensuring business operations meet the highest regulatory standards.
